title: Better Skyblock
description: [Hypixel Skyblock Modpack] A modpack to make your Hypixel Skyblock experience better.
body:
# Better Skyblock modpack
![Better Skyblock logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/771772bf4f48cb63dffc337f41b3971a1ca7643b.png)

Modpack for Hypixel Skyblock (fabric) (1.21.7)
This modpack includes useful client-side **utility** and **performance** mods.
It's meant to be lightweight and not have any outrageous changes

This modpack is intended for the Skyblock game mode on hypixel.net.

## 🔧 List of mods

<details open>
<summary> Installed mods (36 mods)</summary>

## Hypixel Quality Of Life Mods:

- [Drippy Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/project/v3CYg2V9)
- [FancyMenu](https://modrinth.com/project/Wq5SjeWM)
- [Firmament](https://modrinth.com/mod/IJNUBZ2a)
- [Hidden Recipe Book](https://modrinth.com/mod/NbPqFmZs)
- [Roughly Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/nfn13YXA)
- [SkyBlock Profile Viewer](https://modrinth.com/project/8yqXwFLl)
- [Skyblocker](https://modrinth.com/mod/y6DuFGwJ)
- [Tooltip Scroll](https://modrinth.com/project/wySVd6d8)

## Performance Mods:

- [EntityCulling](https://modrinth.com/mod/NNAgCjsB)
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/uXXizFIs)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/gvQqBUqZ)
- Nvidium (comes packed with the modpack)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/AANobbMI)
- [Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/PtjYWJkn)

## Quality Of Life Mods:

- [[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/project/4I1XuqiY)
- [[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/project/BVzZfTc1)
- [Chat animation](https://modrinth.com/project/DnNYdJsx)
- [Cubes Without Borders](https://modrinth.com/project/ETlrkaYF)
- [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/k2ZPuTBm)
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/YL57xq9U)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/mOgUt4GM)
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/QdG47OkI)
- [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/project/8qkXwOnk)
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/project/qQyHxfxd)
- [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/Bh37bMuy)
- [Sodium Fullbright](https://modrinth.com/project/iVSjpXol)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/w7ThoJFB)

## Library mods:

- [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/project/lhGA9TYQ)
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/project/9s6osm5g)
- [Collective](https://modrinth.com/project/e0M1UDsY)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/project/P7dR8mSH)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/project/Ha28R6CL)
- [Konkrete](https://modrinth.com/project/J81TRJWm)
- [Melody](https://modrinth.com/project/CVT4pFB2)
- [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/project/eXts2L7r)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)](https://modrinth.com/project/1eAoo2KR)

</details>

## 🎨 List of Resourcepacks

<details open>
<summary> Resourcepacks (1)</summary>

- [FurfSky Reborn](https://modrinth.com/project/khMbd0K1)
